Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x6536 "THEFIFTHAXIS-CA00-6536" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $ca00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Fifth Axis, The.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $CA00 which sets $0101 to $01 and $0102 to $41 to allow the game to run correctly (these values are used to set $DC0E and $DC0F at $65A7 and $65AD)
